# Daily Report — 2026-05-01

## Task Completed
Implemented `list_asset_contracts` and `get_asset_contract` tools targeting the ServiceNow `alm_contract` table (Contract Management application).

- **`list_asset_contracts`** — paginated listing with filters for vendor (substring), state, contract type (substring), short description (substring), start_date_from (>=), end_date_before (<=), and raw query passthrough.
- **`get_asset_contract`** — single-record lookup by `sys_id` or contract `number` (e.g. CON0001234); handles 404 and empty-result gracefully.
- **`_format_contract`** — normalises reference dict fields (vendor, contract_type, category, assigned_to, department, company, location) to display values.
- Both tools registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, `tool_packages.yaml` (system_administrator + full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 858 passed, 4 deselected
- Coverage: 91% overall; contract_tools.py at 98%
- All passing: yes
- New tests: 31 (TestFormatContract, TestListAssetContracts, TestGetAssetContract)

## Security
Pre-existing vulnerabilities in infrastructure dependencies (mcp, cryptography, pip, setuptools, wheel, pyjwt). No new vulnerabilities introduced.

- `src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py`

## Next Up
Implement `get_asset_contract` tool (fetch single contract by sys_id) — already done as part of today's task. Next: item 3 — Add `create_asset` to service_desk package in `tool_packages.yaml`.
